stereotype: «Engine» — pure deterministic computation; no I/O; called directly from workflow code without Activity wrapper
volatility: The Method's machine-checkable semantic / cross-artifact / system-legality rule set — an evolving activity tied to the SystemDesign/ProjectDesignPhaseWorkflow gating rules. New cross-artifact checks, new legality/cardinality predicates, and new severities are mechanized here over time. Artifact shapes are NOT this Engine's job (those are now type-enforced by smart constructors).

ops.signature: ValidateVolatilities(volatilities: Volatilities, glossary: Glossary, scrubbedRequirements: ScrubbedRequirements) → ValidationResult
ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow
ops.note: Check volatility↔requirement traceability, glossary resolution, two-axis independence, and nature-of-business/speculative smells (Warning) across three typed models

fields.name: scrubbedRequirements
fields.note: canonical shared domain type — owns traceability cross-reference

fields.name: Verdict
fields.note: Pass | Fail; Pass ⟺ zero Error-severity findings

fields.name: Findings
fields.note: deterministically ordered by (Location.Ordinal, RuleID); may contain Warning/Info even on Pass

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: programmer errors only: ContractMisuse (nil required input), InvalidInput, InternalInvariant

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow
ops.note: Check 2–6 core use cases cardinality and that any UseCase with a nested condition has a non-nil activity diagram

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow
ops.note: Run the ch.4 Architecture Validation suite: layering legality (no-up/no-sideways/no-skip/12-Don'ts/pub-sub origin+destination), cardinality (≤5 Managers, golden-ratio Warning, total-count Warning), and call-chain coverage (every core use case has a DynamicView)

fields.name: system
fields.note: Grammar A typed model (projectStateAccess.md §3.3): Components, Relationships, DynamicViews

fields.name: coreUseCases
fields.note: needed for call-chain coverage: every core use case must have a supporting DynamicView in System

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow
ops.note: Check that every operational decision traces to a business objective in the MissionStatement

fields.name: mission
fields.note: objectives that operational decisions must resolve against

ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow
ops.note: Check that every waived checklist item carries a non-empty justification

dataContracts: ValidationResult = { Verdict Verdict; Findings []Finding } // Verdict == Pass ⟺ zero Error-severity findings
Verdict = int enum { VerdictUnknown, VerdictPass, VerdictFail }
Finding = { RuleID RuleID; Severity Severity; Message string; Location *Location } // Message safe to weave into worker re-draft prompts
RuleID = string // namespaced '{AREA}-{nnn}'; stable across runs
Severity = int enum { SeverityInfo, SeverityWarning, SeverityError } // only Error fails the verdict
Location = { Ordinal int; Section string } // no Line field — input is a typed model, not bytes
framework-go/engine.Error { Kind Kind; Detail string } // programmer errors only: ContractMisuse, InvalidInput, InternalInvariant
System, UseCase, CoreUseCases, MissionStatement, Glossary, Volatilities, ScrubbedRequirements, OperationalConcepts, StandardCheck // canonical in shared domain package / projectStateAccess.md §3
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — programmer errors only (ContractMisuse: nil required input; InvalidInput: structurally unusable input; InternalInvariant: malformed Finding from a predicate). No transient/retryable errors — no I/O. A semantically invalid artifact is VerdictFail on the result channel, never the error channel.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure deterministic functions. Same inputs always produce the same ValidationResult (same verdict, same ordered findings). No side effects.

revisions.summary: Initial design taking Content []byte + MIMEType; encapsulated ArtifactSchema (now retired)

Re-cut to named Phase-1 validation business verbs (ValidateVolatilities/ValidateCoreUseCases/ValidateArchitecture/ValidateOperationalConcepts/ValidateStandardCheck) over specific typed models. Dropped ValidationContext/PriorArtifacts/phase/MethodPhase. Predicate suite re-homed under owning verbs. ArtifactSchema retired; shape is now type-enforced by smart constructors.

SENIOR REVIEW PASSED — verdict pass; all agenda items confirmed. 5-verb set + per-verb inputs including ValidateArchitecture(System, CoreUseCases) for call-chain coverage; ScrubbedRequirements as its own slot (construction follow-up); ValidationContext removal as anti-generic win; Error/Warning severity split confirmed; Phase-2 cap trigger deferred. Two text-only corrections applied. App C §6 9/9 PASS. Contract frozen.
